prompt: Write a Ruby script that creates a multimodal UserMessage with TextInputContent and BinaryInputContent, and constructs a complete RunAgentInput object.
assertions: The code initializes UserMessage with content as an array of TextInputContent and BinaryInputContent
The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Types::RunAgentInput with thread_id, run_id, state, messages, tools, context, forwarded_props
